name: cisco-thousandeyes-tools
description: MCP tools for Cisco ThousandEyes data in Splunk
author: cisco-thousandeyes-setup skill

tools.name: cisco_thousandeyes_check_health
tools.title: ThousandEyes Health Check
tools.description: Overview of ThousandEyes data flow across all input types (metrics, traces, events, activity, alerts, path visualization).
tools.spl: | tstats count as event_count dc(sourcetype) as sourcetype_count where index=thousandeyes_* by index | sort - event_count

tools.name: cisco_thousandeyes_list_inputs
tools.title: ThousandEyes Input Status
tools.description: List all ThousandEyes data inputs with their enabled/disabled status.
tools.spl: | rest /services/data/inputs/all splunk_server=local | search eai:acl.app=ta_cisco_thousandeyes | table title, eai:acl.app, disabled | rename title as Input, disabled as Disabled

tools.name: cisco_thousandeyes_metrics_summary
tools.title: ThousandEyes Metrics Summary
tools.description: Recent test metrics data from ThousandEyes streaming inputs.
tools.spl: index=thousandeyes_metrics sourcetype="cisco:thousandeyes:metric" | stats count by source, sourcetype | sort - count

tools.name: cisco_thousandeyes_events
tools.title: ThousandEyes Events
tools.description: Recent events from ThousandEyes event polling.

tools.name: cisco_thousandeyes_activity
tools.title: ThousandEyes Activity Logs
tools.description: Recent activity and audit log entries from ThousandEyes.

tools.name: cisco_thousandeyes_traces
tools.title: ThousandEyes Traces
tools.description: Recent test trace data from ThousandEyes streaming inputs.
tools.spl: index=thousandeyes_traces sourcetype="cisco:thousandeyes:trace" | stats count by source, sourcetype | sort - count
